title: City break with food and photos
summary: A compact city report covering route planning, food spots, and photo-friendly streets.
content: This city break was short but full of energy, with a clear route from the station to the old town and river walk.
The highlight was the market hall area, where food options and street atmosphere worked perfectly together.
For next time, I would reserve more time for side streets and evening photography.
route: Station -> Old town -> River walk -> Market hall -> Museum quarter
